remarks.zh: 这是一个关于窗户制作的多行输出示例，请根据需要调整偏移值 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.
remarks.ms: Contoh output multi-baris untuk pembuatan tingkap. Laraskan offset jika perlu (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Contoh keluaran multi-baris untuk pembuatan jendela. Sesuaikan offset jika diperlukan (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: ตัวอย่างผลลัพธ์หลายบรรทัดสำหรับการทำหน้าต่าง ปรับค่า offset ตามความจำเป็น (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Ví dụ về xuất nhiều dòng cho sản xuất cửa sổ. Điều chỉnh các khoảng cách nếu cần (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Halimbawa ng multi-line na output para sa paggawa ng bintana. Ayusin ang mga offset kung kinakailangan (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပြတင်းပေါက်ထုတ်လုပ်မှုပြင်အချည်းနှီးမှုနေရာအတွက်ပိုင်းစီအထွေထွေကိုယ်နေပေါင်းပါ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: ឧទាហរណ៍នៃលទ្ធផលច្រើនបន្ទាត់សម្រាប់ការផលិតបង្អួច សូមកែតម្រូវ offsets ដោយចាំបាច់ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຕົວຢ່າງປອດບໍ່ເອພາລ ສໍາລັບຄວາມຖືເອົາຕາມລຳດຽວກັນ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: 窓の製作のためのマルチライン出力例。必要に応じてオフセットを調整してください (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 창문 제작을 위한 다중 줄 출력 예제입니다. 필요에 따라 오프셋을 조정하세요 (AI translated, please check)
